title: Bratislava, Bratislava Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bratislava, Bratislava Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bratislava is a city in Bratislava Region with a population of 475,503. Slovakia’s charming capital on the Danube, a city of castle-topped hills, vibrant café culture, and a growing tech scene, uniquely bordering Austria and Hungary.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
